name: time-to-shoot
description: Time To Shoot — frontend (React/Vite) + backend (Express/Postgres). Each folder deploys independently; this root only orchestrates local dev.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c yellow,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && npm install
